title: Globlin's Gun Game
description: Have you ever thought your friend's base was a little too big? Build a fighter jet and drop a nuke on it. This pack is designed to be focused around warfare. We have Warium, Trackwork, Clockwork, Valkyrien skies, and compatibilities between them.
body:
This pack is focused on warfare. But before you can get a vehicle, you need the infrastructure. This pack will have you create a factory in order to supply your war efforts. The main mods are Warium, Create: Big Cannons, and various physics mods in order for you to construct a vehicle. 

Also included is the Tardis Refined mod, with this you will be able to have a small area only you will be able to access, away from bombing range. Your valuables will be safe inside, but your factory will be accessible to griefing. Hide it well, and rush to be the first to complete the arms race. The man with the bigger bomb controls the world.
